title: orthosiphon reflexus
intro: Orthosiphon reflexus, also known as Miswak or Uva Ursi, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and parts of Australia. The medicinal properties of Orthosiphon reflexus lie in its leaves, which contain compounds that have been traditionally used to treat urinary tract issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its diuretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. Herbal preparations of Orthosiphon reflexus are often consumed as teas or tinctures, and can be found in various forms, including capsules and infusions, for the treatment of urinary tract issues and other health conditions.
